Home/ Rooms/ Deluxe King
City-view room★★★★★ 4.9 · 410 stays

Deluxe King

Light, breezy and built entirely around the view. A king bed dressed in crisp linen, a private balcony that hangs over the city, and floor-to-ceiling glass that opens to the hum of the city.

2Guests
1King bed
36 m²Room & balcony
180°City view

Made for slow mornings

Wake with the light, throw open the doors, and take your coffee on the balcony as the city comes alive below. Inside: a deep rain shower, a marble vanity, and the kind of bed you have to be talked out of. Housekeeping twice daily, turndown each evening, and the waterfront a short walk away.

In the room

Private city-view balcony
King bed & premium linen
Air-conditioning & fan
Rain shower & marble bath
Minibar & Nespresso
Smart TV & fast Wi-Fi
Twice-daily housekeeping
Pool, gym & spa access

Your rate includes

Breakfast for two, daily
Pool, spa & gym
Wi-Fi & secure parking
No booking fees

Seasonal rates

Our nightly rate shifts with the seasons. The price you see always includes breakfast, hotel access and every tax — no booking fees, ever.

Winter
May – Aug
R3,900 /night
SpringBest value
Sep – Oct
R4,600 /night
Summer
Nov – Feb
R6,200 /night
FestivePeak
15 Dec – 5 Jan
R7,800 /night

Good to know

Check-in & outFrom 2:00 PM · until 11:00 AM
Free cancellationCancel free up to 48 hours before arrival
GuestsSleeps 2 · children over 12 welcome
Pets & smokingAssistance animals only · non-smoking room

Guest reviews

Loved by 410 guests

4.9★★★★★410 verified stays
The view
5.0
Cleanliness
4.9
Comfort
4.8
Location
5.0
Value
4.7
★★★★★March 2026

“We woke to the hum of the city every morning and had coffee on the balcony watching the bay. The room is exactly as pictured — bright, spotless and steps from the waterfront.”

SM
Sarah & Marcus
London, UK
★★★★★February 2026

“Booked direct and paid less than the OTAs — no hidden fees, breakfast included, and the housekeeping was faultless. That view is worth every rand.”

TN
Thandi N.
Johannesburg, SA
★★★★★January 2026

“The rain shower and marble bath felt like a spa. Staff remembered our names by day two. We've already rebooked the Deluxe King for next summer.”

DK
Daniel K.
Berlin, DE
★★★★★December 2025

“Floor-to-ceiling glass, a king bed you sink into, and the waterfront a short walk away. Cape Town at its very best — we didn't want to leave.”

AL
Aisha L.
Dubai, UAE

RRoyal Hotel

A contemporary grand hotel in the heart of Cape Town. City-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and spa, and a calmer way to stay in the city.
